description: Phantom Concerts is an AI-powered live concert experience by Phantom City Studios, built for institutions, IITs, universities, corporates, conglomerates, leadership summits, innovation forums, and global iconic flagship events.
audiences: Institutions, IITs, universities, campuses, and cultural institutions
Corporates, conglomerates, leadership summits, executive forums, and innovation stages
Global iconic hosts, celebrity-facing platforms, and flagship live event buyers

offerings.name: Institutional Flagship
offerings.ideal_for: IITs, universities, cultural institutions, and landmark academic stages
focus: Theme-led storytelling and cinematic AI visuals

offerings.name: Corporate Experience Edition
offerings.ideal_for: Leadership summits, innovation forums, client showcases, and executive stages
focus: Live AI demonstration with polished brand command
Convention, summit, and flagship event scalable solutions

offerings.name: Global Iconic Edition
offerings.ideal_for: Global celebrities, conglomerates, cultural icons, and flagship hosts
focus: Celebrity, icon, and chairman-level guest architecture
Luxury-grade staging, creative direction, and bespoke show command
No-compromise global orchestration across talent, venue, security, and spectacle

launch_reference.name: Phantom Concerts World Premiere at HIVE 3.0
